From the table, the languages mentioned are:
- French (rows 3, 20, 25, 32)
- English (rows 7, 11, 15, 25, 26, 29, 30, 34, 35, 37, 38, 42, 43)
- Japanese (rows 19, 22, 36)
- German (rows 18, 23, 24)

- Serbo-Croatian (row 28)
- Korean (row 31)
- Catalan (row 33)
- Greek (row 39)
- Italian (row 40)
- Chinese (row 41)

- English appears 13 times.
- French appears 4 times.
- Japanese appears 3 times.
- German appears 3 times.
- The other languages appear once or twice.
